name: Poor Adam's Almanack
summary: Weekly newsletter on building from Guam in the AI age. Founder OS, mental models, ship logs. Free Sunday issue plus paid bonus issues.

name: AnchorScan Reports
summary: Programmatic AI diagnostics for any business URL. Free top-of-funnel today. Paid annual subscription tier coming.

name: Workflow Build revshare stakes
summary: 15% of net new revenue attributable to each AI Workflow Build, for 24 months, capped at $50k per client. Stacks silently with every closed deal.
